workout.warmup: Incline walk · 8–10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline — do not skip.
workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: If machine is taken, swap to Pendulum Squat at 70 lb/side × 10 × 3 — then leg press goes next lower session. Confirmed at 390 × 10 × 3 on June 9. Controlled tempo, don't lock out at top.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Plate-loaded — 10 lb increments only. Confirmed at 200 × 12 × 3. Full hip extension, squeeze at top, no hyperextension.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: Got 11 on set 3 last session — push for 12 on set 3 today. Once you hit 12 consistently, that's the signal to bump weight.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: If these feel controlled and clean today, bump to 35 lb next lower session.

exercises.name: Core Circuit D
exercises.detail: Plank Shoulder Tap × 10/side + Dead Bugs × 10/side + Pallof Press 40 lb × 10/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: All back-safe. Slow and controlled on dead bugs — lower back pressed flat.

workout.coach_notes: Pendulum squat alternates with leg press — it's not in this session. Next lower body gets pendulum squat instead of leg press. RDL stays off until upper back sharpness is completely gone.
